overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay from a sci-fi survival horror game. An armored character explores the dark industrial interior of a space station, navigating through maintenance tunnels, interacting with terminals, and moving through corridors with dynamic lighting shifts from orange terminal glow to teal ambient light and yellow emergency lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: terminal room with holographic map kiosk

events.description: character retrieves access card from the terminal interface
character turns away from terminal and begins walking toward the exit

agents.ego_description: standing at the terminal kiosk retrieving an access card, then turning to walk past a body on the floor toward the door

entered.detail: futuristic terminal with orange holographic display showing station map and canteen location
glowing orange interface with text reading CANTEEN and station layout
deceased person in orange suit lying against the wall with blood pooling nearby

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character interacting with a glowing orange terminal kiosk displaying a station map. After retrieving an access card, the character turns and walks past a body lying on the floor, heading toward a locked airlock door in the dimly lit room.

scene_state.functional_zone: maintenance tunnel with exposed red piping

events.description: character enters dark maintenance corridor from the terminal room
lighting shifts to darker red-lit industrial tunnel with visible steam

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow maintenance tunnels with exposed red pipes and metal grating floors

entered.detail: large red and silver industrial pipes running along the walls and ceiling
metal ladder attached to the wall leading to upper maintenance areas
wall-mounted control interface with buttons and status lights

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the terminal room into a dark, narrow maintenance tunnel characterized by exposed red piping and industrial equipment. The lighting is dim with red emergency lights illuminating the metal grating floors as the character approaches a control panel and airlock door.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional corridor to atrium with yellow emergency lighting

events.description: environment brightens with yellow linear light fixtures as character exits maintenance tunnel
character enters stairwell area with metal stairs and B1 level signage

agents.ego_description: navigating through airlock doors and ascending metal stairs toward the atrium level

entered.detail: horizontal yellow emergency light bars mounted on the walls
illuminated directional sign pointing toward the atrium
metal stairs with railings leading to upper levels

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the dark maintenance tunnels into a corridor with distinctive yellow emergency lighting. Passing through an airlock door marked with an atrium sign, the character ascends a metal staircase in a concrete stairwell marked with B1 level signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: canteen area with teal ambient lighting and glass partitions

events.description: character enters larger open canteen area from narrow stairwell corridors
ambient lighting shifts from yellow to teal and cyan tones in the open space

agents.ego_description: exploring the open canteen area with glass walls, looking for the path forward

entered.detail: large glass windows and partitions separating different areas of the station
horizontal cyan and teal LED light strips along walls and floors
illuminated sign indicating the canteen area ahead
futuristic vending unit with glowing interface

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wider, open canteen area featuring teal and cyan ambient lighting and glass partition walls. The space is more open than previous corridors, with vending machines visible and debris scattered on the floor as the character navigates toward the next airlock door.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor with horizontal neon light strips leading to red emergency door

events.description: character enters corridor with distinctive horizontal white neon lighting
character slows approach to red-lit emergency door marked 01

agents.ego_description: walking down a long corridor with horizontal neon strips toward a red emergency door

entered.detail: parallel horizontal white light strips running along both walls
heavy airlock door bathed in red light with the number 01 displayed
wall-mounted ventilation and filtration system grates

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character entering a corridor illuminated by distinctive horizontal neon light strips on both walls. The character walks toward a heavy red-lit emergency door marked with the number 01, which serves as the focal point at the end of the hallway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic industrial interior that evolves from dim maintenance tunnels into a brightly lit, futuristic station hub. It begins with the character interacting with a glowing orange terminal kiosk before moving past a fallen body toward a locked airlock. As the character enters a narrow maintenance tunnel, the environment shifts to a dark space of exposed red piping and metal grating, which then opens into a concrete stairwell illuminated by yellow emergency lighting. The scene expands further as the character emerges into a wide canteen area bathed in teal and cyan ambient light, navigating past glass partitions and vending machines. Finally, the camera follows the character into a corridor defined by horizontal neon light strips, moving steadily toward a heavy red-lit emergency door marked 01.
